disclaimer.label: Disclaimer
disclaimer.value: {{projectName}} is a free and open-source project that provides a user interface for streaming movies and TV shows. It does not host any content itself, but rather requires a OMSS implementation (like {{coreName}}) to provide the actual streaming services. {{projectName}} is intended for educational and personal use only, and should not be used for commercial purposes. Users are responsible for ensuring that they comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding the use of streaming content.

footer.tagline: Your ultimate destination for movies and series. Watch movies and tv shows online for free with no ads or tracking!

cookie-policy.label: Cookie Policy
cookie-policy.value: We do not use/collect any kinds of cookies or other telemetry data.💪

searchdialog.emptyIdle: Let the force guide your search...
searchdialog.emptyNoResults: Hmm... Lost you are... Found results are not

watchhistory.title: Watch History
watchhistory.empty: No history yet. Start watching something!

language.info: We are working on translating the app to more languages. If you are interested in helping us out, please consider contributing to our translation efforts at {{gitUrl}}.

reset.title: Reset all app data?
reset.description: This will clear ALL stored data (settings, history, etc). This cannot be undone.
reset.label: Remove all data from this site
reset.info: This will remove all data from this site and give you a clean fresh slate.

clear.title: Clear watch history?
clear.description: This will permanently remove your entire watch history.

empty.title: No history yet
empty.description: Start watching something and it will appear here.

item.removeDescription: This will remove this item from your history.

autoplayNext.label: Autoplay Next Episode
autoplayNext.description: Automatically play next episode when available

omss.title: OMSS Server ({{coreName}})
omss.label: OMSS ({{coreName}}) API URL

note.title: CSP Note
note.value: If you are running the app fullstack (i.e. with the fastify backend) and set the VITE_OMSS_API_URL env variable, the website will not be able to make requests to any other site other then TMDB and the OMSS_API_URL you've provided.

omss.info: `localhost` means that your OMSS Server is running locally and only for you.

tmdb.title: TMDB
tmdb.info: This can only be changed by rebuilding the application with the new API key

region.info: Will change TMDB's "Trending Now" Section etc. to your selected Region. {{projectName}} tries to guess your region based on your browser settings. You probably don't have to change this.
